case_title: CITY CARSHARE VS. PHAM HUYEN et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY CARSHARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUYEN, PHAM NGUYEN, PHUC $1,695.21 PRINCIPAL, $79.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,774.21, JUDGMENT AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT NEGLIGENCE CAUSED THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
